title: sida linifolia var. hassleri
intro: Sida linifolia var. hassleri, also known as the Hassler's sida, is a variety of the sida linifolia plant, a flowering plant species in the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sida linifolia var. hassleri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, this plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
